# Code Review Checklist — ocr-fichas-na Constitution Compliance

When reviewing a pull request for this project, use the **single source of truth** checklist defined in `.github/prompts/code-review.prompt.md`. The PR **MUST NOT** be merged until every applicable item in that checklist is confirmed.

---

## Source of Truth

To avoid drift between documentation and the project's code review "constitution", this file intentionally does **not** duplicate the detailed checklist items.

- The canonical checklist is maintained in:  
  `.github/prompts/code-review.prompt.md`
- Any change to the project's review criteria MUST be made in that file.
- If additional reviewer guidance is needed here, reference or quote only small, relevant excerpts and keep them synchronized with the prompt file.

---

> **Reminder:** If a checklist requirement needs changing, open a PR updating `.github/prompts/code-review.prompt.md` with justification, reviewed by all active contributors. This file should continue to defer to that canonical checklist.
